description: Beta patch: classify Codex channel streamed deltas and verify published packages on public npm after CI publish.
changelog:
**Bug Fixes:**
- fix(channel): add `detail.kind`, `detail.stream_id`, and `detail.phase` to Codex `item/agentMessage/delta` progress events so consumers can split interleaved output and commentary streams.

**Internal:**
- chore(release): verify `@blxzer/trellis` and `@blxzer/trellis-core` are visible on the public npm registry after CI publish.
notes: Run `npm install -g @blxzer/trellis@beta` and `trellis update` to use the Codex channel stream metadata fix. No file migration is required.
